# CatalystForge

> CatalystForge builds company profiles, CRM, HRIS, POS, AI support, dashboards, and operational systems for Indonesian businesses — transforming digital needs into deploy-ready solutions.

CatalystForge is a software house based in Bandung, Indonesia, serving businesses with digital transformation solutions. We combine business consulting, UI/UX design, engineering, deployment, and support into one integrated service.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://catalystforge.web.id): Main landing page with service overview
- [Privacy Policy](https://catalystforge.web.id/privacy): Kebijakan Privasi (Bahasa Indonesia)
- [Terms of Service](https://catalystforge.web.id/terms): Ketentuan Layanan (Bahasa Indonesia)
- [English Home](https://catalystforge.web.id/en): English version of the main site
- [English Privacy](https://catalystforge.web.id/en/privacy): English privacy policy
- [English Terms](https://catalystforge.web.id/en/terms): English terms of service

## Product Demos

- [Company Profile](https://company.catalystforge.web.id): Company profile site with about, operations, governance, sustainability, and contact pages
- [CRM Demo](https://crm.catalystforge.web.id): CRM product demo with accounts, pipeline, tasks, and reporting
- [HRIS Demo](https://hris.catalystforge.web.id): HRIS product demo with employees, attendance, payroll, and performance
- [POS Demo](https://pos.catalystforge.web.id): POS product demo with sales, inventory, and transactions
- [AI Support Demo](https://ai.catalystforge.web.id): AI support console with conversations, knowledge base, and chat integration
